en: Computes the pi-notation product of a given expression. For more details, read the [extended description](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Computational-Effects])
Computes the derivative of a given expression. For more details, read the [extended description](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Computational-Effects])
Computes the integral of a given expression. For more details, read the [extended description](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Computational-Effects])
Computes the limit of a given expression. For more details, read the [extended description](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Computational-Effects])
Registers a constant (duh), which can be used in the evaluate expression (described in [Evaluating Expressions](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Evaluating-Expressions)).
A constant name must consist of one letter optionally followed by one or more letters or digits
If that's any clearer to you, the regex Skuared uses is '[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\\d]*.'
Computes the summation of a given expression. For more details, read the [extended description](https://github.com/Syst3ms/Skuared/wiki/Computational-Effects])
Evaluates a mathematical expression.
Check out [the advanced description](TUTORIAL_URL#evaluate-expression) for WAYYY more information !
Evaluates a mathematical expression with a provided number. The number can be referred to in the expression using 'x'
Check out [the advanced description](TUTORIAL_URL#evaluate-expression) for WAYYY more information !
Gets the result computed by a [computational effect](TUTORIAL_URL#computational_effects)
If something has gone wrong in nearly any of Skuared's syntaxes, will contain a descriptive error.
Represents the number of edits from one string to another. An edit can be adding, removing or replacing a letter.
Adding 'ignor(e|ing) case' makes it so uppercase and lowercase letters don't count as an edit.
Gets the [Soundex](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Soundex) code of a given string
